auth.title: Sign in to Meavo MRP
auth.subtitle: Sign in with your company Google account.

home.description: Track on-hand stock, record receipts and inventory counts. Google Sheets production sync coming soon.
home.balancesDescription: Current quantities per warehouse (Aksakovo default for batches).
home.balancesEmpty: No balances yet. Add materials, then record a receipt or inventory count.
home.balancesShowingLowest: Showing {shown} of {total} balances — lowest quantities first.
home.topMaterialsDescription: Total on-hand stock for your configured priority materials across warehouses.
home.topMaterialsEmpty: Add material codes in Settings to populate this list.
home.sheetsNote: Sync with the „Статус на партиди“ sheet will activate after Google service account setup.

materials.title: Materials
materials.subtitle: Raw materials you track in the warehouse.
materials.addDescription: Code can match your Zeron item code.
materials.name: Name
materials.bomMissingDescription: {count} code(s) appear in ElementBOM but are not in Materials — add them or re-import Materials.
materials.invalidUnitsDescription: {count} material(s) use a unit outside the Zeron list (бр, квм, м, л, кг) — fix them.
materials.top20Description: Priority materials from Settings — total stock across warehouses.

electrics.title: Electrics
electrics.subtitle: Electrical components and wiring stock.
electrics.placeholder: Coming soon — electrical materials and BOM tracking will be added here.

csv.materialsDescription: Download a template or export current materials, then upload a filled CSV.
csv.openingDescription: Bulk load inventory counts per warehouse. Blank quantity rows are skipped.
csv.openingHelp: Warehouses: AKS, VAR, KAZ, TOP. Import materials first.
csv.panelListDescription: Import panel names from your master sheet (Списък с панели).
csv.bomDescription: Replaces BOM lines per booth model in the file.
csv.recipesCsvDescription: Replaces BOM lines per booth model in the file.
csv.recipesCsvFooterHelp: Please import Panel List before updating Recipes.

costs.title: Material costs
costs.subtitle: Material cost per booth model and colour (Zeron average and latest unit prices).
costs.missingPrices: {count} materials have no Zeron price — excluded from totals.
costs.recipeDescription: Sorted by highest latest line cost first.
costs.empty: No recipes yet — import Panel List and Recipes CSV.
costs.notFound: No recipe found for this model.

recipes.title: Recipes
recipes.subtitle: Manufacturing materials per booth model.
recipes.selectModelHint: Open the combined recipe for that model.
recipes.topMaterialsHint: Highest quantities for the selected colour and market.
recipes.varyingTitle: Materials that vary by colour or market
recipes.varyingDescription: Variant-specific materials for the selected colour and market.
recipes.recipeDescription: Combined quantities for the selected colour and market.
recipes.empty: No recipes yet — import Panel List and Recipes CSV.
recipes.notFound: No recipe found for this model.

exceptions.title: Batch exceptions
exceptions.name: Exception name
exceptions.modelsHint: Select one or more models this exception applies to.
exceptions.batchesHint: Link one or more production batches. Use whole batch or specific booth IDs.
exceptions.boothIdsHint: Booth IDs separated by comma (when not whole batch)

receipt.title: Receipt
receipt.subtitle: Manual inbound until Zeron API is connected.

inventory.title: Inventory count
inventory.subtitle: Physical count overwrites on-hand and stores variance.
inventory.formDescription: Enter the counted quantity on the count date.
inventory.countedThroughBatchHint: Physical stock reflects production through this batch (inclusive). Material for later batches will be subtracted when production sync runs.
inventory.historyDescription: Variance is shown only when a recount differs from existing on-hand stock.

batches.title: Production batches
batches.subtitle: Synced from the master „Статус на партиди“ sheet. Aksakovo batches are listed first.

detail.noUnits: No packing rows synced for this batch yet.

scan.title: Scan a document
scan.subtitle: Photograph or upload an invoice, proforma, or delivery note.
scan.uploadHint: JPG, PNG or PDF up to 50 MB
scan.pasteHint: Or paste an image with Ctrl/Cmd+V.
scan.successDescription: The document has been uploaded and processed. Review and approve.

deliveryZone.localHelp: 20% Bulgarian VAT charged by the supplier — standard input VAT.
deliveryZone.euHelp: Reverse-charge VAT (Protocol per art. 117 of VAT Act).
deliveryZone.non_euHelp: Import — customs duty and import VAT at clearance; customs declaration (MRN) required.

settings.title: Settings
settings.subtitle: Configure shortcuts and preferences for the stock team.

adminAccess.title: Admin access
adminAccess.description: These accounts can edit settings, top materials, and trigger manual sheet sync. Built-in admins always keep access.
adminAccess.bootstrapHelp: Always active — change only in code deploy.
adminAccess.pasteHelp: One email per line or separated by commas. Added to the built-in list.
adminAccess.configuredEmpty: No extra admins beyond the built-in list.
adminAccess.storageUnavailable: Storage is not configured on this environment — contact an admin.

topMaterials.title: Priority materials
topMaterials.description: Material codes shown on the home page. Paste a list or add codes one by one.
topMaterials.pasteHelp: Separate codes with commas, semicolons, or new lines.
topMaterials.readOnly: Only admins can edit the top materials list.
topMaterials.storageUnavailable: Storage is not configured on this environment — contact an admin.

zeron.title: Zeron sync
zeron.subtitle: Review successful and failed sync attempts.
